About Our University

Welcome to National University of Technology (NUTECH)

Established in 2018, NUTECH is a federally chartered public sector university located in Islamabad, Pakistan. We are committed to fostering innovation, research, and practical learning through industry-aligned education.

Our campus is a hub of creativity, collaboration, and cultural diversity where students from across Pakistan come together to shape the future.

Meet Our Event Management Team

AS

Ahmed Shah

Event Coordinator

Passionate about organizing impactful seminars and tech workshops.

FR

Fatima Rehman

Cultural Lead

Brings creativity and energy to music, drama, and art festivals.

MK

Muhammad Khan

Sports Director

Organizes thrilling inter-department sports tournaments.

CampusEvents

Making campus life more vibrant, one event at a time.
